title: Berlin Hauptbahnhof Guide - Quick Summary
items: **Berlin Hauptbahnhof is layered, not linear.** Long-distance trains, regional trains, S-Bahn, U5, trams, buses, taxis, shops and lockers sit on different levels.
**Use the right exit.** Europaplatz is the north side for trams, buses and many nearby hotels. Washingtonplatz is the south side for taxis, the Spree and the government district.
**Most central Berlin trips need an AB ticket.** Use ABC for BER Airport or Potsdam. Berlin.de lists the 2026 single ticket at EUR 4.00 for AB and EUR 5.00 for ABC.
**Solve luggage before sightseeing.** Hauptbahnhof has lockers and station services, and a full suitcase is not practical on cobblestones, crowded crossings or a 2 hours walking route.
**For Alexanderplatz, use U5 or S-Bahn.** That is the simplest route to the BerlinWalk meeting area at the World Clock.
Use the station arrival planner below if you are choosing between hotel, luggage, sightseeing, the tour meeting point or BER Airport.
